items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-76 eastbound between Exit 345: 30TH ST - MARKET ST and Exit 346A: SOUTH STREET. There is a lane restriction.
items.formatted: I-76 (Philadelphia County) | Multi vehicle crash on I-76 eastbound between Exit 345: 30TH ST - MARKET ST and Exit 346A: SOUTH STREET. Estimated Reopen: 7/15/26 - 12:00
